title: In Society
overview: Two bumbling plumbers are hired by a socialite to fix a leak. A case of mistaken identity gets the pair an invitation to a fancy party and an entree into high society. As expected, things don't go too smoothly.

trailers.title: John Landis on ABBOTT AND COSTELLO IN SOCIETY
